explainers: 1 Tier-1 competitor move in priority markets
headline: MYOB-Microsoft 5-year AI deal lands; APAC accounting AI race fully open.
why_it_moved: Score moved because: 1 Tier-1 competitor move in priority markets

competitors.headline: MYOB confirms 5-year deal with Microsoft to expand AI agents across the platform
competitors.summary: Following Xero/Anthropic, MYOB announced a 5-year deal with Microsoft co-funding AI tooling — agentic cash-flow forecasting, compliance navigation, and SMB insights. Locks in the second AU/NZ accounting platform behind a hyperscaler.
